subject: Luc Quinn - Metformin refill switching to 90 day mail order
snippet: Dr Tremblay moved Metformin 90 day mail order
body: Dear Mr Quinn following Luc Quinn most recent A1C review on 6 October Dr Tremblay has moved his Metformin 500 mg from monthly in-pharmacy pickup to a 90 day mail order refill through Silvertide Mail Pharmacy effective 4 November 2026. Next three refills approximately 3 February 2027, 4 May 2027, and 2 August 2027. Plan travel windows around those arrivals or contact us at least two weeks ahead for a hand carry supply letter. Nurse Cheryl Baker RN

subject: Re: shift bid pattern and summer 2027 window
body: Yves confirming what we walked through at handoff. Standing pattern last three quarters is Week A 07-15 Mon Wed Fri and 15-23 Tue Thu weekend off, Week B mirror with Sat 15-23. Summer 2027 bidding opens 15 May 2027. Marc and Priya both said they can pick up Saturdays through August. Formal time off request in by close 1 June 2027 for the August window. Andrea

subject: Fete de Grand-pere -- premiere idee

Molson pour Grand-pere qui adore ca. Je bloque la salle avec Father Paul si vous etes d accord. Nathalie

subject: Doc partage -- notes 80 ans de Grand-pere -- MAJ
snippet: J ai mis a jour les notes sur Google Docs

Souper chez moi le soir du 1er aout 18h PAS la salle paroissiale Father Paul a mis sa messe d anniversaire de sacerdoce sur le meme weekend. Aunt Denise et Rene chez moi. Papa Luc dans le bureau. Vous et Sienna a l hotel trois rues plus loin. Papa a lu au telephone mais je ne suis pas sure qu il a tout retenu. Nathalie
